title: Alex's caves and Create recipes
description: A small datapack for Create recipes using items from Alex's caves
body:
A small datapack for Create recipes using items from Alex's caves. The recipes are made according to my vision of balance, not allowing you to get unique cave items using Create.There are recipes that cannot be made without using Create.
!!! Important !!! In the datapack, some items require the use of Create mod

The Datapack currently has 38 recipes

Have a nice game
